title: $displayo of $signed leads to internal error (vpi_get_value for format=2 not implemented)
body:
For the [attached example](https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog/files/2058979/test.v.txt), I get this output, using iverilog 10.1 on Debian Stretch:
```
> iverilog test.v
> ./a.out
r1        =  -9238
in binary = 1101101111101010
internal error: vpi_get_value(<format=2>) not implemented for __vpiVThrVec4Stack.
vvp: vpi_vthr_vector.cc:373: virtual void __vpiVThrVec4Stack::vpi_get_value(p_vpi_value): Assertion `0' failed.
Abort
```

If I comment out the $signed() call in $displayo(), there is no internal error.  When running, here is the [expected output](https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog/files/2058978/test.out.expected.txt).
code_blocks:
> iverilog test.v
> ./a.out
r1        =  -9238
in binary = 1101101111101010
internal error: vpi_get_value(<format=2>) not implemented for __vpiVThrVec4Stack.
vvp: vpi_vthr_vector.cc:373: virtual void __vpiVThrVec4Stack::vpi_get_value(p_vpi_value): Assertion `0' failed.
Abort
